headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Acquisition By Waters Corporation Following Quarterly Results
summary: Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar as he highlighted AI winners to buy for 2026. Cramer explained why the stock rallied, as he said: Can you believe these incredible numbers from Waters Corporation? This is the arms dealer to the life science industry.
